title: Chapter 2544 - 35: Instant Kill
content:
Chapter 2544: Chapter 35: Instant Kill

In a secluded mountain realm.

Mo Hua used Water Passing Step, like a water light, desperately fleeing ahead.

Four Elders from Yin Corpse Valley, shrouded in Corpse Qi, were chasing from behind.

After a while, they passed by a valley, where scattered villages lay, inhabited by Loose Cultivators.

Elder Ma was about to proceed and massacre the village.

Just at that moment, Mo Hua, fleeing ahead, seemed to sense something, frantically urged his Spiritual Power, speeding up his Escape Skill.

Elder Ma was slightly stunned.

Elder Xu sneered, "This kid, is afraid we’ll massacre the village, so he is anxious to lead us away quickly..."

"But escaping with full strength like this, his Spiritual Power can’t last long..."

On the way, they had seen that Mo Hua’s Spiritual Power foundation was actually quite flimsy.

Previously, he could escape, entirely relying on his bizarre Concealment and movement technique to survive, now escaping with full effort, his Spiritual Power consumption accelerated, he could hardly hold on for long, likely to become exhausted soon.

This is the difference between the Righteous Dao and the Demon Path.

In the Demon Path, they act unscrupulously, so many things are relatively easier to do.

But the Righteous Dao doesn’t work like that, it must retain a righteous mind, care for the common people, not harm the innocent, there are too many constraints in acting.

In this world, walking the Righteous Dao is far more difficult than the Demon Path.

If not careful, one could lose their life because of a few insignificant, humble Cultivators.

Elder Ma glanced at Elder Xu, "The Loose Cultivators, should we kill them or not?"

Elder Xu sensed Mo Hua’s desperate fleeing figure with his Divine Sense, gave a sinister smile, "Let’s give this kid some face, don’t kill them for now."

Elder Ma nodded, "At the speed this kid is escaping, within two hours, his Spiritual Power will be depleted..."

Elder Xu’s gaze was filled with venom, throughout the journey, the various mockeries and humiliations he had kept in mind.

Once he catches this kid, he will "deal" with him properly.

"Chase!"

The four Elders of Yin Corpse Valley started accelerating their movement technique, chasing Mo Hua.

Thus, after an hour, Mo Hua’s escape speed gradually slowed down, clearly without using tricks and fleeing with all his might, the Spiritual Power consumption was too large, he was struggling to maintain.

Elder Xu and the others couldn’t hide their joy, their gazes turned fierce.

But just at that moment, Mo Hua, who had been escaping along the edge of a Second-Grade Mountain Boundary, suddenly changed direction, fleeing towards an unknown Third-Grade Boundary.

Elder Xu and the others were startled, confused.

"Does this kid want to die? He dares to go to a Third-Grade State Boundary?"

Previously, Mo Hua, apart from his baffling Taoist Skill and unpredictable tactics, had an important external condition, that was, he only escaped within the Second-Grade State Boundary.

The Second-Grade State Boundary was his "shield".

Under the restrictions of the Heavenly Dao, even the four Golden Core Elders of Yin Corpse Valley didn’t dare use their full Cultivation.

But once entering the Third-Grade State Boundary, without the protective restrictions of the Heavenly Dao, surrounded by four Golden Cores, what other than death could await a mere Foundation Establishment?

Elder Xu frowned.

This kid, has he lost his mind?

But it shouldn’t be... Throughout the journey, this kid although arrogant, had cunning intelligence and tactics.

He definitely wouldn’t do meaningless things.

Elder Ma said solemnly, "Could there be someone ahead at the Third-Grade State Boundary meeting him? Or any other ambush?"

Elder Xu’s expression turned serious.

These possibilities were not out of question.

This kid’s Cultivation is so unusual, he must come from a notable origin, there must be experts in his Sect.

"We can’t delay anymore!" Elder Xu’s eyes flashed, "Let’s press closer, once this one enters the Third-Grade State Boundary, immediately unleash Golden Core Power, and capture him with full force, must not delay, delayed changes arise!"

Elder Ma and the others nodded in unison: "Yes!"

Afterwards, within an hour, Mo Hua began showing signs of "exhaustion."

Elder Xu’s eyes gleamed fiercely, but moments later, Mo Hua suddenly staggered, transformed into mist, and vanished.

The Elders of Yin Corpse Valley were stunned.

Mo Hua disappeared again.

Elder Xu gritted his teeth, repeated his old trick, called forth "Earth Store Corpse", feeding it with blood.

But this time, he fed particularly more blood.

This Earth Store Corpse wasn’t summoned casually.

Along the way, to track Mo Hua, Elder Xu had already summoned it excessively many times, the originally "tame" Earth Store Corpse, already drunk on his blood, had become somewhat greedy.

Summoning a few more times, the Earth Store Corpse might "lose control", and in turn, devour him, its "owner".

After all, any "strange corpse" that signed a corpse contract hoped for their corpse owner’s death.

That way, they could consume the corpse owner, and further grow and evolve.

Seeing the greedy eyes of the Earth Store Corpse, Elder Xu knew he couldn’t afford any more delay.

He immediately used cryptic corpse language, to inquire about Mo Hua’s whereabouts, then pointed forward to the right, angrily said:

"This one has entered the Third-Grade Boundary, kill!"

The four Elders of Yin Corpse Valley immediately exploded with all force, crossing over the mountain boundary, into the Third-Grade State Boundary.

But after proceeding for a while, no figure was around, no sense of Mo Hua’s presence under Divine Sense.

Elder Xu frowned, was contemplating when suddenly heard murmuring corpse language again.

The Earth Store Corpse, for some reason, "kindly" told him Mo Hua’s whereabouts, even didn’t ask for his blood.

As the corpse owner, Elder Xu didn’t think much at the time.

Immediately followed the Earth Store Corpse’s guidance, focused his Divine Sense, discovered the concealed Mo Hua between a valley.

Elder Xu waved his hand, urged green Corpse Qi, shrouded the valley.

Within the Third-Grade State Boundary, his Golden Core Cultivation could be fully exerted, the scope of Corpse Path Evil Skill larger, the power stronger.
